titleStmt.title: SII 24.206: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 206. (A.R. No. 44 of 1948-49.) THIRD PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL OF THE DORAI-MAṆḌAPA.

summary.p: Records a gift of tax-free land capable of yielding 2,000 kalam of paddy and a revenue of 163 poṉ in the village Aṉbil in Irā[ja*]rā[ja*]-vaḷanāḍu as maḍappuṟam to the Śrīvaishṇavas of the Avaṉivēndarāmaṉ-maṭha established after the name of the king, by Dēvapirāṉ Aḻagiyaperumāḷ alias Sundara-Pāṇḍya Kāliṅgarāyar of Viḷattūr in Miḻalaik-kūṟṟam. The gift seems to have been made in the 3rd year of the king Jaṭāvarmaṉ Tribhuvaṉachakravartin Kōnēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ. The king is evidently identical with a Sundarapāṇḍya who is known to have been called Avanivēndarāmaṉ and who is also known to have been born on the day of the asterism Uttiraṭṭādi (Nos. 299 and 300 of 1943-44). Since Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya I and III were born in the asterisms Mūla and Pushya respectively this king may be identified with Sundara Pāṇḍya II who ascended the throne in 1276 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ— koccaṭapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ koneriṉmai koṇṭāṉ perumāḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ koyil tiruppati śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷukku tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil koyil vikkiramacoḻaṉ tiruvitiyil vaṭa kaṇṭattu
mel ciṟakil tiruvācalukku vaṭakku namperāl miḻalaikkūṟṟattu viḷattūruṭaiyāṉ tevapirān Aḻakiyaperumāḷ cuntarapāṇṭiyak kāliṅkarāyar ceyvikkiṟa Avaniventarāmaṉ maṭattil Amutu ceykiṟa śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷukku maṭappuṟamāka nel Iraṇṭāyira
kkalattukkum poṉ ṉūṟṟu Aṟupattumuṉṟukkum Uṭalāka Irācaṟāca vaḷanāṭu kiḻai muṟiyili Aṉpilil tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam maṉittar Iṟaiyili nikki Uḷḷūrilum kuṟu nattañ cūḻnta nilattilum kār maṟu nilam nāla raiyum Oru pū nilam patiṉonṟaraiyum Āka nilam
patiṉaṟu veli puṉcey nilam Irupatiṟṟu veli Itil teṟkil vikkiramacoḻaṉ tiruvitiyil mel tuṇṭattu teṉciṟakil tiruvācalukku meṟkku vaḻutivaḷa nāṭṭu tiruttulaivillimaṅkalattu Ayacil Araṅkar Appaṉ deventiravallabha brahmārāyar
Avaniventarāman maṭattil Amutu cey śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukku maṭappuṟamāka viṭṭa kār maṟunilam veli Oru pūnilam veli puṉcey nilam Iraṇṭarai nikki kārmaṟu nilam muṉṟarai Oru pūnilam pattarai Āka rūpāy 10 4 li puṉcey rūpāy 10 7(1/2) Āka kār(ā)maṟu rūpāy 4 Oru pū rūpāy (5) 10 6
(5) 100 6 10 puṉcey rūpāy 2 10 li ti viḷai nilam patiṉaṟu veliyum puṉcey nilam Irupatiṟṟu veliyum muṉṟāvatu taimāta mutal mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākat taṉtu Innilam kārum maṟuvum Oru pūvumaṟuvum kaṭaippūvum karumpu ceṅkaḻanīr vāḻaikoḻuntu Iñci mañcaḷ ku kamuku
palā mā Uḷḷiṭṭa vāṉ payirum parutti Āmaṇakku Eḷḷu vaḻutilaippākal varaku payiru Uḷḷiṭṭa puṉpayirum ceytu Aṉupavippatākavum Ittāl varum peruvari nelvari kārk kaṭamai māvaṭai puṉpayirkkaṭamai taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārappāṭṭam vari Iṉavari
Iṭaiyar vari Ērimīṉ pāṭṭam kāṇikkai kāttikaippaccai pañcupili Ōlai Eḻuttup peṟuvārkaḷ peṟu lāñcaṇaippeṟu Āṭttevai Āṇṭeḻuttuttevai Āṟṟukkaraittevai Āṉaiccālai kutiraippantittevaiyuṭpaṭṭa maṟṟum Eppenpaṭṭa
Iṟaikaḷum tevaikaḷum Iṉṉāḷ mutal variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻippatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭi(p)pāṭākak koṇṭu Innilam nāṉ kellaiyum tiruvāḻikkallum nāṭṭi cantirātittavarc cella kallilum cempilum veṭṭi koḷka
nallūruṭaiyāṉ Ivai māḷavarāyan Eḻuttu nilam tiruveḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 24.206 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
